channel.title: Library on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Library on Arrans github.io

item.title: ocornut/imgui
item.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies

item.title: open-source-labs/Svelvet
item.description: 🎛 A Svelte library for building dynamic, infinitely customizable node-based user interfaces and flowcharts

item.title: alecthomas/chroma
item.description: A general purpose syntax highlighter in pure Go

item.title: sbstjn/timesheet.js
item.description: JavaScript library for HTML5 & CSS3 time sheets

item.title: faiface/pixel
item.description: A hand-crafted 2D game library in Go

item.title: vugu/vugu
item.description: Vugu: A modern UI library for Go+WebAssembly (experimental)

item.title: pterm/pterm
item.description: ✨ #PTerm is a modern Go module to easily beautify console output. Featuring charts, progressbars, tables, trees, text input, select menus and much more 🚀 It’s completely configurable and 100% cross-platform compatible.

item.title: zitadel/oidc
item.description: Easy to use OpenID Connect client and server library written for Go and certified by the OpenID Foundation

item.title: adrg/xdg
item.description: Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories

item.title: arran4/golang-ical
item.description: A ICS / ICal parser and serialiser for Golang.

item.title: arran4/tsobjectutils
item.description: Some typescript objects I use in a couple repos
